channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road in BOL is worst for wear, 13th March
item.description:
Massive cracks in the road appearing - slight shake to house as car goes past house 138/ 179. Road needs new tarmac and road markings.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136, Burnt Oak Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafiti on wall by telephone call box, 13th March

item.title: Grafiti tags on mural, 13th March

item.title: Speed hump directional sign fallen off lampost, 13th March
item.description:
Please see to photos attached, the directional sign has fallen of the lampost here on the junction of Annerley Road with Hamlet Road. Column number A 30 08

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 112, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Unemptied bin, 13th March
item.description:
This bin has been waiting to be emptied for 8-9 days. Other rubbish, including broken glass and dumped paint tins are accumulating around it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fletching Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 13th March
item.description:
Located at flat 1-11 Newstoke House at top of Beatty where it joins Stoke Newington Rd. It needs an “eyes” sign here please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
